title: Leaders meet after border incident as talks continue
body: Diplomats met late Tuesday after a border incident. Negotiations continue and both sides requested de-escalation.

title: Border incident prompts emergency talks between leaders
body: Emergency talks were held after a border incident. Officials said the two countries are negotiating a quick de-escalation.

title: Emergency talks continue after border clash
body: Following the border clash, diplomatic talks continue. Both sides said further meetings are planned.

title: Central bank keeps rates unchanged amid inflation concerns
body: The central bank kept rates unchanged and signaled caution while inflation remains elevated.
